entities.baby: a baby crawling toward the stairs
entities.father: a father reading on the couch

scenes.title: The Living Room
scenes.background_prompt: A living room with an open staircase, a couch, a coffee table with a mug, a play mat with toys, and a baby gate that is open. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A living room in a family home. A baby of about ten months in a white onesie with blue stars crawls energetically across the hardwood floor, heading directly toward an open staircase. The baby gate at the top of the stairs stands open — someone forgot to close it. The baby is only a meter away from the first step, moving with determined speed. On the couch against the far wall, the father in a flannel shirt and jeans is deeply absorbed in reading a thick paperback novel, legs stretched out on the coffee table, a mug of coffee beside him. He does not see the baby. A colorful play mat with scattered toys — blocks, a rattle, a soft ball — lies in the center of the room where the baby was presumably playing moments ago. The scene is charged with quiet urgency.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place baby on the hardwood floor, crawling energetically toward the open staircase, about one meter from the first step. Place father on the couch (far wall), deeply absorbed in a thick paperback, legs on coffee table, not seeing the baby.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left corner of the scene, a wooden staircase with brown steps and a matching railing ascends toward the upper left. At the base of the stairs, two wooden safety gates are swung wide open, attached to the wall and the banister. A baby with light brown hair, wearing a light blue short-sleeved onesie, is crawling on the light brown wooden floor toward the open gates. To the right of the baby, in the center foreground, sits a round, low wooden coffee table with four legs. On top of the table is a white mug decorated with green leaf patterns. Further to the right, in the bottom right corner, a colorful rectangular play mat with star and heart patterns lies on the floor. On the mat, a brown teddy bear sits upright next to a set of four colorful alphabet blocks labeled A, B, C, and D. Also on the mat are a small orange toy car and a stuffed turtle toy with a pink shell and blue limbs. Behind the coffee table, a green upholstered sofa sits against the wall. A yellow knitted blanket is draped over the left armrest. The father, a man with curly brown hair, is sitting on the sofa, leaning back against a white pillow. He is wearing a green sweater with a white pattern and grey trousers, and he is holding an open blue book with the word "STORIES" on the cover. Behind the sofa is a large, three-paneled arched window with a wooden frame. Through the window, a bright outdoor scene is visible under a blue sky with white clouds, featuring a green lawn with small white and blue flowers and two rounded green trees. The interior walls are painted light blue and decorated with soft white cloud patterns that match the sky outside. The scene is set indoors during a bright, sunny day.

S: sunny living room with blue walls
large arched window showing green trees
wooden staircase with open safety gates
IE: baby crawling toward the open gates
father reading a book on the sofa
IR: baby feeling curious about the stairs
P: baby trying to climb the stairs
father wanting to finish his story
A: sitting on the green sofa reading
CO: baby getting closer to the stairs
father not noticing the open gates
